issue_title: Any script that calls itself will enter a frozen state
issue_body:
### The problem

If a script includes a call to itself, this call is not executed and the script enters a frozen state, where it cannot be stopped or executed anymore until a complete HA restart.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/60046864/149759820-1a399259-9bdc-4543-8f77-c89ba3c96fd5.png)


### What version of Home Assistant Core has the issue?

core-2021.12.9

### What was the last working version of Home Assistant Core?

_No response_

### What type of installation are you running?

Home Assistant OS

### Integration causing the issue

_No response_

### Link to integration documentation on our website

_No response_

### Example YAML snippet

```yaml
alias: Nuevo script
sequence:
  - delay:
      hours: 0
      minutes: 0
      seconds: 10
      milliseconds: 0
  - service: script.SCRIPT_ID_HERE
mode: restart
```


### Anything in the logs that might be useful for us?

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_
